description_long: This is a cylindrical, off-white candle with a realistic, slightly irregular surface and prominent melted wax drips cascading down one side. The top of the candle is recessed, forming a shallow well around a visible black wick at the center. The wax appears thick and opaque, with a matte finish and subtle surface texturing that mimics the look of real wax. The melted wax has pooled and overflowed on one side, creating two distinct drips that hang down the side of the candle. The back and sides are smoother, with less pronounced features, while the front is dominated by the dramatic wax flow. The overall appearance suggests a hand-poured candle that has been partially burned, suitable for decorative use in urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description: A cylindrical, off-white candle with a recessed top, visible wick, and dramatic melted wax drips down one side. The surface is matte and textured, resembling real wax.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed top, visible wick, and prominent wax drips flowing down the side.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the wax drips and the rounded, irregular rim of the candle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smoother, uninterrupted cylindrical surface with no wax drips visible.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the transition from the smooth back to the area where the wax drips begin.
